name: kingbootoshi/codex-orchestrator
summary: Claude Code plugin and CLI for offloading long-running or parallel coding work to Codex jobs that can be monitored, redirected, and captured through tmux sessions.
evidence: Provides Codex agent spawning, output capture, and mid-task steering through tmux-backed jobs.
The orchestration point of view is Claude Code first, so it fits better as a reference than a Codex-first framework.
